SALEventSet.Enumeration: CameraServerMode_Auto=0, CameraServerMode_Idle=1, CameraServerMode_Standby=2, CameraServerMode_Blanks=3, CameraServerMode_Bias=4, CameraServerMode_Flats=5, CameraServerMode_Darks=6, CameraServerMode_Science=7, CameraServerMode_Shutdown=8

DreamWarning_PowersavingActivated=0x01, DreamWarning_UpsOnBattery=0x02, DreamWarning_DomeClosedByNogo=0x04, DreamWarning_DomeClosedBySun=0x08, DreamWarning_DomeClosedByEnv=0x10, DreamWarning_DomeClosedByUps=0x20, DreamWarning_DomeClosedByTimer=0x40, DreamWarning_DomeStopped=0x80, DreamWarning_DomeForcedOped=0x100, DreamWarning_DomeClosedByDoor=0x200, DreamWarning_RubinNoClient=0x400, DreamWarning_RubinMultipleClients=0x800, DreamWarning_RubinClientStale=0x1000, DreamWarning_RubinWeatherTooOld=0x2000, DreamWarning_RubinBadWeather=0x4000, DreamWarning_RubinNogo=0x8000, DreamWarning_ScriptClientActive=0x10000, DreamWarning_InletHumWarning=0x20000, DreamWarning_InletTempWarning=0x40000, DreamWarning_CameraNNotConnected=0x80000, DreamWarning_CameraSNotConnected=0x100000, DreamWarning_CameraENotConnected=0x200000, DreamWarning_CameraWNotConnected=0x400000, DreamWarning_CameraCNotConnected=0x800000, DreamWarning_SimulatedDome=0x1000000, DreamWarning_SimulatedLeds=0x2000000, DreamWarning_SimulatedUps=0x4000000, DreamWarning_SimulatedPdu=0x8000000, DreamWarning_SimulatedEnv=0x10000000, DreamWarning_SimulatedSun=0x20000000

DreamError_LimitSwitchError=0x01, DreamError_DomeError=0x02, DreamError_BackdoorOpen=0x04, DreamError_DoorOpen=0x08, DreamError_UpsError=0x10, DreamError_Pdu1Error=0x20, DreamError_Pdu2Error=0x40, DreamError_TemphumError=0x80, DreamError_PsuError=0x100, DreamError_UpsBatteryNeedsReplace=0x200, DreamError_CameraBayTempError=0x400, DreamError_CameraBayHumError=0x800, DreamError_ElectronicsHumidityError=0x1000, DreamError_DomeHumidityError=0x2000

item.Description: If true, DREAM observations are paused by operator, using pause command.
The current observing mode for DREAM. A CameraServerMode enumeration.
The desired mode for DREAM, which DREAM should be working to enter. A CameraServerMode enumeration.
The current state of the enclosure. A DomeState enumeration.
The desired state of the enclosure, which DREAM should be working to enter. A DomeTargetState enumeration.
The current state of the heater. A HeaterState enumeration.
The desired state of the heater, which DREAM should be working to enter. A HeaterState enumeration.
The current state of the peltier regulator. A PeltierState enumeration.
The desired state of the peltier regulator, which DREAM should be working to enter. A PeltierState enumeration.

For each of the devices controlled by the power distribution unit, true if the PDU is supplying power to that device. The devices are:
0. Switch 1. USB hub 2. PSU 1 3. PSU 2 4. Central Camera 5. North Camera 6. East Camera 7. South Camera 8. West Camera 9. Command Server 10. Central Server 11. North Server 12. East Server 13. South Server 14. West Server

Whether each of DREAM's relays are switched. The relay controls are:
0. Motor power 1. Motor direction 2. Peltier power 3. Peltier direction 4. Window heater power
A bit flag indicating errors reported by DREAM, defined by the DreamError enumeration.
A bit flag indicating warnings reported by DREAM, defined by the DreamWarning enumeration.
Any errors reported by DREAM that are not in the DreamError enumeration. The string contains a brief text description of the each error, with the errors separated by semicolons.
Any warnings reported by DREAM that are not in the DreamWarning enumeration. The string contains a brief text description of the each warning, with the warnings separated by semicolons.
Heating on/off. True for on.
Cooling on/off. True for on.
True when UPS is online. False when UPS is offline.
True when UPS battery charge is low.
True when UPS reports that it needs a new battery.
The last reason reported by the UPS for switching to battery.
True when UPS commercial power isn't running, the UPS is providing power from its battery.
True for communication error.
True if outside humidity, reported by the observatory, is outside safe limits.
True if outside temperature, reported by the observatory, is outside safe limits.
True if dome humidity is outside safe range.
True if enclosure temperature is outside safe range.
True if enclosure humidity is outside safe range.
True if electronics box cannot be reached.
True if given temperature sensor doesn't provide temperature updates.
True if dome position as reported by the absolute encoder is unknown, and therefore system cannot operate the dome.
True if communication with DAQ (Data Acquisition) is lost.
True if communication with the Power Distribution Unit (PDU) is lost.

SALEvent.Description:
DREAM camera imaging events. Each attribute contains five values, one for each camera:
0. East 1. West 2. North 3. Central 4. South

item.Description: Current operating mode of the camera. A CameraServerMode enumeration.
Number of images of type "blank" collected by the camera. These images are not saved but their collection is recorded for completeness.
Number of dark images collected by the camera.
Number of bias images collected by the camera.
Number of flat field images collected by the camera.
Number of science images collected by the camera.
Number of images that were "missed" by the pipeline.
Sequence number of the most recent collected image.
Trigger time (TAI) of the most recent collected image.
Timing latency of the most recent collected image.
USB latency of the most recent collected image.
Artificial latency of the most recent collected image.
Image type of the most recent collected image. A CameraServerMode enumeration.
Median pixel value of the most recent collected image.

SALEvent.Description: Most recent commands from the CSC to the DREAM controller.

item.Description: Most recent data sent to DREAM with the `setWeather` command, indicating that it is okay to open.
Most recent data sent to DREAM with the `setRoof` command, indicating whether DREAM should proceed with observing.
